author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thanks for installing the Gambling cog! Use `[p]gambling` to get started. All credits are virtual — no real money is involved.
name: Gambling
short: Virtual credits casino with Blackjack and leaderboards.
description: A virtual gambling system with a credits economy and casino games. Supports per-member inventories, game statistics, and multiple leaderboard types. First game: Blackjack with standard casino rules. No real money involved.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-member virtual credit balances and game statistics.
